creator: ports@mark.reidel.info
text:
This is a slave-port for x11-themes/bluecurve-themes which was marked broken because the pkg-plist was missing and the file referenced in the master-port unfetchable. I submitted another PR for the master port, they should be committed together.

Added file(s):
- pkg-plist

Port maintainer (jylefort@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
